scripts.deploy:d1: pnpm run build:web && cd apps/worker-d1 && pnpm run wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:kv: pnpm run build:web && cd apps/worker-kv && pnpm run wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:angular-d1: pnpm run build:angular && cd apps/web-angular && pnpm run wrangler deploy
scripts.migrate:d1:remote: cd apps/worker-d1 && pnpm run wrangler d1 migrations apply chat-d1-db --remote
scripts.migrate:d1:local: cd apps/worker-d1 && pnpm run wrangler d1 migrations apply chat-d1-db --local
